scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; allowed=0; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) allowed=1 ;; esac; case "$npm_execpath" in *pnpm*) allowed=1 ;; esac; [ "$allowed" -eq 1 ] || { echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1; }'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/scripts run check:workspace-isolation
